display_text: Cloak of Flames, Cost: 0: A very fine cloak that plays host to an overly-protective living flame. Provides a permanent Immolate aura that deals 45 magic damage per second to enemy units within a 375 radius. Illusions deal 30 damage per second. Non-purchasable neutral item providing area-of-effect damage. Stats: Damage: 45/sec (30/sec for illusions), Radius: 375.
